caption: A woman with long dark hair wears a striped shirt and over-ear headphones while speaking in an indoor setting. She is positioned in front of a plain wall and light-colored curtains. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom left corner of each scene. Initially, she speaks with an expressive face and open mouth. As the sequence progresses, she gestures with her right hand, which briefly enters the frame. Her expression then shifts to a more neutral, attentive look with her mouth closed or slightly open, while she continues to gaze forward. A light-colored piece of furniture is partially visible behind her on the right side of the frame. Throughout the clip, her position and attire remain consistent as she interacts with someone off-screen.
